hero.description: SESIT is driving the digital transformation of agriculture by integrating intelligent sensing, data analytics, and autonomous control systems — enabling smarter, more efficient, and sustainable farming across North Africa.

about.label: About Sesit
about.title: Systems That
about.para1: Born in Tunisia, SESIT builds adaptive agricultural systems that continuously learn from sensor networks, weather patterns, and crop behavior — creating an intelligent layer between nature and farming that optimizes every drop of water.
about.para2: Our team of engineers and agronomists has developed TELMA — a self-evolving platform that processes millions of data points to automate irrigation decisions, predict crop needs, and adapt to the unique conditions of Mediterranean agriculture.
about.val1Desc: Self-learning systems that evolve with your farm's unique patterns
about.val2Desc: Conserving water for future generations through predictive optimization
about.val3Desc: Decisions powered by pattern recognition and real-time data streams
about.val4Desc: Systems that perceive, decide, and act without human intervention

features.label: Platform Capabilities
features.title: Intelligence at
features.subtitle: A comprehensive platform built for the demands of modern agricultural systems.
features.f1Desc: Models that anticipate crop water needs based on growth patterns, soil dynamics, and weather forecasts.
features.f2Desc: Continuous multi-sensor data fusion with anomaly detection, creating a live digital twin of field conditions.
features.f3Desc: Pattern mining across historical datasets, yield correlations, and resource optimization insights each season.
features.f4Desc: Autonomous timing that adapts to micro-climate zones, learning from feedback to reduce waste.
features.f5Desc: Full operational transparency from anywhere — with proactive alerts, decision explanations, and overrides.
features.f6Desc: Redundant systems with encrypted pipelines, edge processing fallbacks, and 99.9% uptime guarantees.

impact.label: Proven Impact
impact.title: Measurable
impact.subtitle: Every metric improves as the system learns — compounding gains season after season.

achievements.label: Our Story
achievements.title: The
achievements.description: From a bold idea born in Tunisia to an autonomous agriculture platform — discover the milestones, breakthroughs, and people that shaped SESIT.

services.label: Our Services
services.title: A complete
services.subtitle: From installation to maintenance, SESIT supports you at every step to guarantee the performance of your smart agriculture systems.
services.s1Desc: Turnkey deployment of TELMA and AgroSelf systems on-site: hardware configuration, sensor wiring, controller setup, and validation under real conditions.
services.s2Desc: Integration of autonomous control loops for irrigation, climate regulation, and nutrient management — zero manual intervention, AI-driven decisions.
services.s3Desc: Preventive and corrective maintenance plans to ensure operational continuity: periodic inspections, firmware updates, and component replacement.
services.s4Desc: Responsive support from our specialized engineers: remote diagnostics, tele-maintenance, on-site interventions, and user team training.
services.s5Desc: Dedicated post-deployment support: performance monitoring, parameter optimization, hardware warranty, and priority access to software updates.
services.ctaText: Contact our technical team for a free audit.

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.title: Ready to
contact.description: Request a free consultation or schedule a field demo. Our team is ready to show you how TELMA can optimize your irrigation.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your irrigation needs...
contact.toastDesc: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

footer.description: Smart irrigation for modern agriculture. From Tunisian soil to global innovation — building the future of autonomous farming.

partners.label: Consortium
partners.title: Our
partners.subtitle: SESIT is powered by a consortium of Tunisia's leading academic institutions, research labs, and innovation hubs — each bringing unique expertise to build the future of smart agriculture.
partners.partnerSubtitle: We collaborate with Tunisia's top academic and innovation institutions to push the boundaries of smart agriculture.
partners.ctaDesc: We're always looking for new academic and industry partners to advance smart agriculture in Tunisia and beyond.
partners.p1desc: Sup'Com is a center of excellence in IoT, artificial intelligence, and advanced communications. Through its INNOVCOM laboratory, Sup'Com develops smart IoT technologies, advanced communication modules, data analysis models, and AI components integrated into the AgroSelf platform.
partners.p2desc: As a national reference in agronomy and cropping systems, INAT brings essential expertise. It contributes to the design and optimization of soilless cropping systems, scientific validation of growth protocols, evaluation of agronomic performance, and integration of biofertilizers and other sustainable solutions.
partners.p3desc: The Automatic and Systems Laboratory (LACS) of ENIT, a specialist in automation, control, and intelligent systems, contributes to intelligent system control, process automation, environmental regulation, and the development of autonomous and reliable control blocks.
partners.p4desc: Smart Tunisian Technoparks accelerates the project by providing tailored mentoring, an environment conducive to innovation, experimentation and demonstration spaces, and strategic support towards industrial valorization.
partners.p5desc: SHANTI is a Tunisian association whose mission is to collectively build innovative and creative solutions to today's social, economic, cultural, and environmental challenges. SHANTI implements these solutions through projects and services, contributing to building a supportive and inclusive society based on equal opportunities and access to rights.
partners.p6desc: APIA accompanies SESIT in its entrepreneurial journey through the Riyeda program, offering a structured incubation framework, access to national innovation resources, and institutional support for the growth and valorization of high-tech Tunisian startups.
partners.p7desc: INGREF is a public research institution specializing in rural engineering, water management, and forestry. Its expertise covers irrigation systems, sustainable water resource management, and the valorization of agricultural ecosystems, directly contributing to SESIT's goals in smart agriculture and water efficiency.
partners.p8desc: IRESA is the supervising institution for agricultural research and higher education in Tunisia. It federates national agricultural institutions and orchestrates the country's agronomic research strategy, providing SESIT with a strong institutional anchor and access to a leading national scientific network.
partners.p9desc: Research and development activities in the fields of Olive Growing at a national scale and Fruit Arboriculture in semi-arid zones, covering Agronomic components (genetic heritage, improvement, production techniques, phytosanitary aspects...), Technological components (oil and quality, table olive, by-products) and Economic components.
partners.p9h2: Field trial environments for sensor deployment

telma.homeDesc: An adaptive intelligence platform that transforms raw environmental data into autonomous irrigation decisions — learning, predicting, and acting in real time.
telma.homeF1: IoT sensor network with edge computing
telma.heroDesc: An end-to-end autonomous irrigation intelligence system — from field sensors to cloud analytics to real-time actuation. Explore every capability below.
telma.pipelineSub: Five integrated stages — from raw sensor data to autonomous field action.
telma.c1d: TELMA integrates a dense array of smart sensors — soil moisture probes, micro-weather stations, and flow meters — into a unified data fabric. Every reading is streamed in real time to the cloud, building a living digital twin of your fields.
telma.c1h1: Multi-spectrum soil moisture sensing at root depth
telma.c2d: Each field node runs local inference at the edge, processing sensor data instantly without cloud latency. Nodes communicate in a self-healing mesh network, ensuring uninterrupted data flow even in remote agricultural zones.
telma.c3d: TELMA's neural engine transforms raw environmental signals into precise irrigation commands. The system continuously adapts to soil conditions, weather forecasts, and crop growth stages — delivering exactly the right amount of water at the optimal time.
telma.c3h4: Up to 40% water savings vs. conventional methods
telma.c4d: Pressure anomalies and flow imbalances are detected instantly by TELMA's monitoring layer. The platform pinpoints leak locations, quantifies water loss, and triggers automated shutoff valves — protecting both resources and equipment.
telma.c4h2: Geospatial leak localization on field maps
telma.c5d: Clogged emitters and blocked pipelines degrade irrigation uniformity silently. TELMA identifies obstruction patterns before they cause crop stress — scheduling maintenance proactively and extending system lifespan.
telma.c5h1: Flow-pattern anomaly detection per emitter zone
telma.c5h2: Predictive clog scoring with severity levels
telma.ctaDesc: Schedule a live demo with our team and discover how TELMA can transform your irrigation operations.

agroself.heroDesc1: AgroSelf — a pioneering Tunisian initiative dedicated to developing intelligent soilless based growing solutions adapted to the country's climate and water challenges.
agroself.heroDesc2: Cultivating the future with intelligent autonomy — reinventing water usage through AI, sustainable agriculture, and scientific excellence.
agroself.aboutP1: AgroSelf is an innovative Tunisian solution dedicated to developing intelligent soilless solutions adapted to the climatic and water realities of Tunisia. By combining agronomic expertise, IoT technologies, and artificial intelligence, AgroSelf enables sustainable, high-performance, and controlled agricultural production while optimizing the use of water, energy, and nutritive resources.
agroself.guidingSub: The values that drive every aspect of the AgroSelf solution.
agroself.v1d: AgroSelf transforms innovative concepts into deployable agricultural systems — bridging the gap between research and real-world impact.
agroself.v2d: Every solution is validated through controlled experimentation and peer-reviewed methodologies before reaching the field.
agroself.v3d: Sustainability isn't an afterthought — it's the foundation. AgroSelf designs for minimal environmental impact at every stage.
agroself.wipDesc: AgroSelf is actively under development. From lab prototyping to field installation, follow our journey as we bring intelligent soilless growing to life across Tunisia.
agroself.clickHint: Click on a completed step to explore its content
agroself.conceptionDesc: Our intelligent greenhouse design — from initial concept to detailed 3D modeling.
agroself.constructionDesc: On-site construction and infrastructure build-out — cables, foundations, and structural work.
agroself.p1d: AgroSelf designs advanced soilless systems that allow plants to grow without soil, using nutrient-enriched water solutions precisely calibrated to each crop's needs. This approach eliminates soil-borne diseases, reduces water usage by up to 90%, and enables year-round production regardless of external climate conditions.
agroself.p2d: In a country facing increasing water scarcity, AgroSelf tackles one of Tunisia's most critical challenges. The solution deploys AI-driven monitoring and optimization systems that track water quality, manage recycling circuits, and ensure every drop is used with maximum efficiency across the entire growing cycle.
agroself.p2h1: Real-time water quality monitoring (pH, EC, dissolved oxygen)
agroself.p2h3: Predictive consumption modeling per crop cycle
agroself.p2h4: Compliance with Tunisian water governance standards
agroself.p3d: AgroSelf harnesses the power of IoT sensors, edge computing, and machine learning to build a fully connected agricultural ecosystem. Environmental parameters — temperature, humidity, light intensity, CO₂ levels — are continuously analyzed to autonomously adjust growing conditions for optimal yield.
agroself.p3h1: Dense sensor networks with real-time telemetry
agroself.p3h2: Machine learning models for growth prediction
agroself.p3h4: Cloud dashboards for remote farm management
agroself.p4d: Backed by rigorous agronomic research, AgroSelf bridges academic science with practical farming applications. The solution collaborates with Tunisian universities and research institutions to validate each innovation through controlled experiments before real-world deployment.
agroself.p4h4: Continuous iteration based on field data
agroself.p5d: AgroSelf envisions a future where agriculture thrives in harmony with the environment. By eliminating chemical pesticides, minimizing water waste, and enabling local food production, the solution contributes to food sovereignty and environmental resilience across Tunisia and the broader MENA region.
agroself.p5h2: Reduced carbon footprint per kilogram of produce
agroself.p5h3: Local food production reducing import dependency
agroself.p5h4: Scalable model for arid and semi-arid regions
agroself.expertiseSub: SESIT brings its expertise in IoT, artificial intelligence, and smart field systems to power AgroSelf's mission.
agroself.pc1d: We build the connected sensor networks and edge computing backbone that powers AgroSelf's intelligent monitoring.
agroself.pc2d: Our machine learning expertise drives the predictive models and autonomous decision engines at the heart of AgroSelf.
agroself.pc3d: Rigorous research programs ensuring every innovation is scientifically validated before field deployment.
agroself.pc4d: We provide training, dashboards, and ongoing technical support to help farmers adopt smart agriculture.
agroself.ctaDesc: Visit the official AgroSelf website to learn more about the solution, its team, and how you can get involved in shaping the future of sustainable agriculture in Tunisia.

journey.heroDesc: In 2020, Nasreddine Somaali set out to solve one of Tunisia's most pressing challenges — water scarcity in agriculture. What started as a research project became SESIT: an autonomous intelligence platform redefining how farms interact with technology.
journey.heroTagline: From first idea to funded projects and international recognition.
journey.founderBio: Dr. Engineer — Nasreddine leads SESIT's mission to bring intelligent agritech solutions to North African farmlands.
journey.ctaDesc: Whether you're a farmer, researcher, partner, or investor — we'd love to connect. The future of agriculture is autonomous, and it's being built right here.
journey.startiDesc: SESIT competed in Starti 4, Tunisia's premier startup competition, presenting its vision for smart autonomous agriculture. The judges were convinced — SESIT walked away with the prize for its groundbreaking idea in precision agritech.
journey.startiH2: Presented the SESIT smart irrigation concept
journey.startiH3: Won the prize for innovation in AgriTech
journey.mashrou3kDesc: SESIT earned first place in the Mashrou3ek entrepreneurship programme under the Governorate of Ariana — a recognition of the team's vision for intelligent, sustainable agriculture and its capacity to deliver real, deployable innovation.
journey.inatDesc: SESIT has established a strategic research partnership with the Institut National Agronomique de Tunisie (INAT), one of Tunisia's leading agricultural research institutions. This collaboration bridges the gap between cutting-edge IoT technology and deep agronomic expertise.
journey.inatH1: Joint R&D on precision irrigation systems
journey.inatH2: Access to INAT's agronomic research data
journey.inatH4: Field trials on INAT experimental farms
journey.inatCardSub: Tunis, Tunisia · Est. 1898 · Leading agronomy research
journey.novationDesc: SESIT joined the Novation Business Accelerator, a premier Tunisian startup acceleration programme that provides mentorship, funding access, and a powerful network to help deep-tech startups scale from idea to market.
journey.novationH2: Access to investor network & funding rounds
journey.jordanDesc: SESIT travelled to Jordan to visit the National Agricultural Research Center (NARC), strengthening international ties and exploring collaborative opportunities in smart agriculture research.
journey.jordanH1: Visited NARC — Jordan's premier agri-research hub
journey.jordanH2: Presented SESIT's AgroSelf smart greenhouse concept
journey.jordanH3: Explored joint R&D opportunities in arid-zone farming
journey.bariDesc: SESIT was invited to the CIHEAM — Mediterranean Agronomic Institute of Bari, a world-leading centre for sustainable agriculture research. This mission deepened SESIT's international footprint in the Mediterranean AgriTech research landscape.
journey.bariH1: Presented SESIT's precision AgriTech platform to CIHEAM researchers
journey.bariH2: Explored joint R&D on Mediterranean arid-zone water management
journey.osirrisDesc: SESIT proudly announces the official closure of the OSIRRIS smart irrigation research project, conducted under the prestigious TUNGER 2+2 Tunisian–German bilateral cooperation programme. 🇹🇳 🤝 🇩🇪
journey.osirrisH1: SESIT represented Tunisian technology in this landmark bilateral project
journey.osirrisH2: Developed innovative smart solutions tackling water stress & climate change
journey.osirrisH3: Delivered new IoT-driven products for sustainable, efficient precision irrigation
journey.osirrisH4: Strengthened Tunisian–German scientific cooperation under TUNGER 2+2
journey.osirrisH5: Cemented SESIT's position as a leader in intelligent agri-tech R&D
journey.osirrisBadge: OSIRRIS — Precision Smart Irrigation · Officially Closed 2026
journey.waveDesc: As part of the AgroSelf project, SESIT proudly participated in the WAVE Connect 2026 event at Sup'Com, showcasing cutting-edge smart agriculture technology and the live TELMA system to industry leaders and investors.
journey.waveInnovationTitle: Innovation at the Heart of Our Action
journey.waveInnovationDesc: Through a continuous and global R&D approach, SESIT brings forth smart solutions and intelligent products — delivering agriculture that is more sustainable, more efficient, and accessible to all.
journey.waveH1: Live demonstration of TELMA Crops Smart Management system
journey.waveH2: AgroSelf smart greenhouse concept presented to top investors
journey.waveH3: Precision sensors & AI-driven irrigation showcased in action
journey.waveH4: Project funded by the Ministry of Higher Education (MESRS)
journey.waveH5: Strategic partners: Sup'Com · SESIT · S2T · NEERS
journey.waveSupcomFull: École Supérieure des Communications de Tunis
journey.neftaDesc: SESIT travelled to Nefta — one of Tunisia's most ancient oasis cities — to study traditional water management systems and explore the potential of precision smart agriculture in extreme desert conditions.
journey.neftaH1: Studied traditional foggara underground irrigation channels
journey.neftaH2: Assessed precision water needs of date-palm oasis agriculture
journey.neftaH3: Evaluated TELMA sensors in extreme desert conditions
journey.neftaH4: Identified autonomous irrigation opportunities in arid zones
journey.neftaH5: Documented traditional farming practices for AI model training
journey.riyedaDesc: SESIT had the honour of participating in Riyeda 13 — one of Tunisia's most important events dedicated to entrepreneurship and innovation. As a startup incubated by APIA (Agence de Promotion des Investissements Agricoles), SESIT was among the featured startups showcasing its AgriTech solutions for a more sustainable agriculture.
journey.riyedaH1: Exhibited SESIT's precision AgriTech solutions to the public
journey.riyedaH2: Highlighted smart irrigation and autonomous farming technology
journey.riyedaH3: Startup incubated by APIA — Agricultural Investment Agency
journey.riyedaH4: Enriching exchanges and inspiring encounters with innovators
journey.riyedaH5: Showcase of AgriTech for sustainable & accessible agriculture
journey.hollandDesc: SESIT travelled to the Netherlands to explore the world's most advanced AgriTech ecosystem, visiting PRIVA — a global leader in greenhouse automation, climate control, and precision horticulture systems.
journey.hollandH1: Visited PRIVA — world leader in greenhouse climate & irrigation automation
journey.hollandH3: Studied Dutch greenhouse innovation for transfer to Tunisian agriculture
journey.hollandH4: Evaluated PRIVA's IoT sensor and AI crop-management systems
journey.hollandH5: Strengthened SESIT's international AgriTech knowledge base
journey.hollandBadge: De Lier, Netherlands · PRIVA AgriTech Visit

agroselfSection.label: Our Latest Solution
agroselfSection.desc: AgroSelf — a pioneering Tunisian initiative dedicated to developing intelligent soilless solutions adapted to Tunisia's climate and water challenges. We combine agronomic expertise, IoT technologies, and artificial intelligence to drive sustainable, high-performance agriculture.

installations.label: Field Deployments
installations.title: Our Latest
installations.subtitle: Real-world deployments of SESIT's smart agriculture technology across Tunisia.
installations.pageSubtitle: From research greenhouses to open field sites — SESIT's technology is actively deployed across Tunisia.
installations.inatDesc: SESIT's flagship smart soilless installation at the National Institute of Agronomy (INAT) in Tunis. The system features TELMA autonomous irrigation intelligence, multi-sensor field monitoring, and closed-loop water management — delivering measurable yield and resource efficiency gains.
installations.elkefDesc: IoT-based field sensor deployment in the El Kef region, integrating soil moisture, temperature, and weather monitoring to support precision agriculture in Northwest Tunisia.
installations.sidithabetDesc: Smart irrigation deployment near Sidi Thabet, applying TELMA's autonomous decision-making for optimized water use across peri-urban agricultural zones.
